violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution spray bottle was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Chlorine sanitizer solution was adjusted to proper level of 50 to 100 parts per million at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The Bar Cooler Lid pull handle was observed to be held on with tape and no longer in good repair/easily cleanable. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2024
